title: Cursed Relics - The best of minecraft
description: A modpack that aims to diversify the world and gameplay. Explore the world, collect relics and equipment from new dungeons
body:
![Summer Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33f35badf826e57a9a36ef154290426838ec70c3.png)
# Overview
A modpack that aims to diversify the world and gameplay. Explore the world, collect relics and equipment to defeat the main boss - Ender the Dragon. A huge number of dungeons, mobs and beautiful biomes will not let you get bored. The modpack was created by the same players as you, and they tried to make the game comfortable in all aspects.
![sum](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b5ea972d1d6eedb83f8e0eb99a80aba10ba11a_0.webp)
## Features
▪️ New Biomes

▪️ New Mobs

▪️ New equipment and enchantments

▪️ New Boss fights

▪️ Rebalance

▪️ Multiplayer friendly

▪️ Built-In Shaders

▪️ Built-In ResourcePacks

▪️ Classes

▪️ Skills tree

▪️ 300+ mods
![lake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f093c78886e5619ee693b51b0692b7789dc80e5.png)
## Minimal system requirements(60 fps)
- 12 gigabytes of RAM*
- 4 core processor
- A discrete graphics card with at least 2 gigabytes of video memory(tested on Rx 580)*

* 12 gigabytes will be needed for solo or playing as a world host, if you are playing on a server, 8 gigabytes will be enough
* A discrete graphics card with at least 2 gigabytes of video memory need for a comfortable gameplay with shaders
